# aikido_zen_app_countries (Resource)

Manages country-based IP blocking for a Zen app in Aikido Security.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "aikido_zen_app_countries" "api" {
  app_id = aikido_zen_app.api.id
  mode   = "block"
  list   = ["CN", "RU", "KP"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app_id` (String) The ID of the Zen app.
- `list` (Set of String) Set of country codes (e.g., `CN`, `RU`).
- `mode` (String) Blocking mode: `block` (block listed countries) or `allow` (only allow listed countries).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
